<!--
Thanks for the PR! A few quick reminders:

- Target the `staging` branch for anything user-facing. `main` is production only.
- Run `make pre-push` locally first. It cache-busts, runs Jest, and runs the smoke render.
- Every new JS or CSS file must land in `gh-pages-manifest.txt` too, or it 404s on the live site.
- Look at the wiki `Developer Guide` and `Web Deploy Workflow` pages if any of this is new to you: https://github.com/mdeguzis/proton-pulse-web/wiki
-->
